sidebar.analysisNotTriggered: Devin's AI analysis wasn't auto-triggered for this commit. Run it manually to organize diffs, detect moved code, and flag potential bugs.
sidebar.autoReviewSpendLimitDescription: This pull request reached its auto-review spend limit, so auto-review was turned off. It can be re-enabled from auto-review settings.
sidebar.connectGitDescription: to enable auto-triggered reviews, or run it manually to organize diffs, detect moved code, and flag potential bugs.

sidebar.contactAdminCredits: Contact your billing admin to add more on-demand credits.
sidebar.draftPrDescription: Devin's AI analysis will run automatically when this PR is marked as ready for review to organize diffs, detect moved code, and flag potential bugs. You can also run it manually now.

errors.prNotFoundDescription: The pull request #{{prNumber}} in <repoLink>{{repoName}}</repoLink> could not be found. It may have been deleted, or this Devin organization may not have access to view it.
errors.prNotFoundDescription_public: The pull request #{{prNumber}} in public repository <repoLink>{{repoName}}</repoLink> could not be found. It may have been deleted, or this Devin organization may not have access to view it.
errors.genericErrorDescription: Something went wrong while loading pull request #{{prNumber}} in <repoLink>{{repoName}}</repoLink>.
errors.failedToGroupFiles: Failed to group files - PR may be too large
errors.prMalformed: The PR content appears to be malformed. Please try again.

agent.welcomeMessage: Hey! I'm Devin. I've reviewed this PR and I'm ready to help. Ask me about the changes, or request edits directly.
agent.askDevinShortcut: Ask Devin anything about this PR ({{shortcut}})
agent.askQuestionsPrompt: Ask questions or request edits in the chat.
agent.chatBillingTooltip: Chats are billed to the billing org of the displayed job.
agent.contactAdminAcus: Contact your billing admin to add more ACUs.
agent.contactAdminCredits: Contact your billing admin to add more on-demand credits.
agent.feature1Description: Groups changes into logical sections with clear explanations
agent.feature2Description: Keeps the diff clean by highlighting copy-pasted or moved code
agent.feature3Description: Highlights potential bugs and flags areas that deserve extra careful review
agent.introDescription: Devin Review is an intelligent PR review tool that helps you better understand your team's code before you ship it.
agent.maxIterationsReached: Reached max tool calls — send another message to continue

agent.orgGroupAcuLimitDescriptionChat: Your organization's group has reached its ACU limit, so Devin can't chat about this PR.
agent.orgGroupAcuLimitDescriptionChatWithUsage: {{orgName}}'s organization group has used {{used}} of its {{cap}} ACU limit this billing cycle, so Devin can't chat about this PR.
agent.purchaseAcusChat: Purchase more to chat with Devin about this PR.
agent.purchaseCreditsChat: Purchase more on-demand credits to chat with Devin about this PR.
agent.wellLetYouKnow: We'll let you know when it's ready

jobPage.cliAuthRequired: To access this Devin Review, we need to authenticate with your local Devin CLI. Make sure the CLI is running, then click the button below.

landing.justLaunched: Just launched: security review is now part of every Devin Review.
landing.tagline: is the way to understand code.
landing.subtitle: Code review that organizes diffs, detects moved code, and flags vulnerabilities and bugs.
landing.copyMoveDesc: Automatically detects when code is moved or copied, and shows you where it came from.
landing.organizedDiffsDesc: Automatically organizes PRs into logical sections with explanations
landing.bugDetectionDesc: Identifies potential bugs and flags parts of the code worth reviewing more carefully.
landing.askDevin: Ask Devin questions about your PR
landing.askDevinDesc: Integrates with Devin's agentic reasoning harness to answer any question about the PR or larger codebase.
landing.chatAnnotation: Chat with Devin about this PR
landing.securitySectionTitle: Every code review is now a security review.
landing.securitySectionCoverageDesc: Devin automatically reviews every PR for vulnerabilities, reasoning across your entire codebase to catch the auth bypasses and logic flaws that pattern-matching scanners miss.
landing.securitySectionTriagingDesc: Each finding is ranked by severity and tagged with a CWE ID for easy triaging.
landing.securitySectionFixesDesc: Beyond flagging issues, Devin writes the fix directly and opens it as a merge-ready PR, so it arrives ready for an engineer to review instead of a ticket that waits weeks in a queue.
landing.securitySectionSocialProof: Trusted by teams at American Express

analysis.repoRuleTooltip: Flagged because it violates a repository rule file (AGENTS.md, REVIEW.md, etc.)
analysis.outdatedBadgeTooltip: Findings are from a previous commit

autofix.enabledTooltip: When enabled, Devin will automatically fix review feedback on all Devin PRs in this organization.
autofix.needAdminPermission: You need organization admin permissions to enable auto-fix.
autofix.willFixBugsTooltip: Devin will open a session to fix the bugs found in this PR and automatically fix any future bugs.
